tools.name: github.fetch_incidents
tools.description: Fetches open incident issues from a GitHub repository using the GitHub MCP server. Filters by labels (P1, P2) and returns structured incident data including title, body, labels, assignee, and timestamps.

tools.name: stackoverflow.search_fixes
tools.description: Searches Stack Overflow for known fixes and answers related to a given error signature. Uses the Stack Exchange public API — no authentication required. Returns top answers with scores and links.
